items.title: Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are OUT tonight for the Hawks in the Vegas finale.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are OUT tonight for the Hawks in the Vegas finale.

No surprise, but official that they will end Summer League w/ 4 games played each.

Also out:

Toppin — Not W/ Team
Dennis — R Achilles
Gilbert — L Adductor
McKneely — R Shoulder

items.title: Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are all OUT today for the Hawks.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are all OUT today for the Hawks.

No injuries for those 3 players. Just will be listed as inactive.

Other players out:

Keshon Gilbert — Left Adductor
RayJ Dennis — Right Achilles
Jacob Toppin — Left Adductor/Quad

items.title: Summer Hawks crush Spurs 93-66. Quiet game for lotto pick Kingston Flemings but he orchestrated things -- 5 pts 8 ast 2 TO in 19 minutes. 15 for Asa Newell, 14 for Henri Veesaar.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Summer Hawks crush Spurs 93-66. Quiet game for lotto pick Kingston Flemings but he orchestrated things -- 5 pts 8 ast 2 TO in 19 minutes. 15 for Asa Newell, 14 for Henri Veesaar.
